query: I have an idea for a new product. We should build an AI code reviewer.
why: Raw product ideas belong in labs21-product-suite.

query: We already have a validated blueprint. Write the PRD and the first set of user stories.

query: The PRD is approved. Design the schemas and APIs for the v1 backend.

why: Execution governance belongs in delivery-control, not labs21-product-suite.
